ride_flow.description: Main ride lifecycle from search to completion

details.search: User searches for available rides based on route and time
details.request: User sends ride request to driver
details.accept: Driver accepts or rejects ride request
details.start: Driver and passenger confirm ride start
details.end: Ride completed, payment processed, ratings collected

backup_flow.description: Handles ride cancellations and automatic backup driver assignment

details.trigger_backup: System identifies next best driver from backup list
details.restart_ride: New ride session starts with backup driver

details.calculate_cost: System calculates fare based on distance and time
details.receipt: Receipt generated and sent to user

details.ai_matching: LangGraph-based intent router analyzes user preferences
details.preference_filter: Filters rides based on user sustainability goals
details.route_optimization: Optimizes route for cost and time efficiency
